name: Ireland
content:
I studied abroad in Ireland for a year during my undergrad, though at one point I realized I had stopped doing tourist stuff and mostly just enjoyed living there. If you’re worried about the rain: yes, it does rain a lot in Ireland. But the culture there is built around there being lots of rain, so the rain never felt isolating or depressing. Bring an umbrella. Many areas have wild blackberries, though I will leave it to your best judgement to decide what is edible.
I have included Derry under the Ireland entry because, even though it is in the United Kingdom, I do not have a dedicated U.K. section, Derry is culturally more similar to Ireland than England, and I do not feel like starting a separate Northern Ireland section. There are many sheep and castles throughout. I recommend you befriend them.
I have some other writings from when I lived in Ireland, you can read them here: https://uahhonorssaga.wordpress.com/.
